top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says look to buy these 5 stocks outside the AI trade for diversification

top_signals.title: Pompeo, Markets React to US Tariffs Over Alleged Forced Labor
top_signals.summary: The US is proposing tariffs of at least 10% on imports from most major trading partners after an investigation into alleged forced labor. Mike Pompeo, former US state secretary, offers his view as investors also parse the latest development. (Source: Bloomberg)
